opinion: Ban all guns and label any former gun owners or advocates as lunatics that should be shunned from society.
Total government confiscation of all firearms and ownership of guns should be a crime.
Ban all semi-automatic weapons and require high-cost permits for any other type of firearm.
Require comprehensive background checks for all gun purchases, adopt red-flag laws, impose a mandatory 30-day waiting period, and eliminate the gun show loophole.
Maintain current laws on gun ownership and respect the 2nd amendment.
Standardize shall-issue concealed carry across all states for mentally healthy individuals, minimize training requirements, eliminate gun-free zones, and authorize armed educators and staff.
Repeal the National Firearms Act and legalize all weapon types, with unrestricted carry nationwide and no permits or government records.
Gun ownership should be a mandatory civic duty for all able-bodied adult citizens.
All Americans have a right to own firearms without restrictions; anyone opposing this view is a literal traitor and should be executed for treason.
